creator: free@derodrigo.es
text:
Hi Mark,


I've tried to reproduce the issue, few more times, but I haven't seen it again.

Before opening the ticket, I'd confirmed that it wasn't me forgetting my medication nor the dealer changing the recipe, so I went through the installation process again on same laptop with same media same kbdmap selection and the result was that no keymap line was added on rc.conf.

I can't say anything else but I'm not able to reproduce it today.


Bests,
Rodrigo
